simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere]
  simp only [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
  rw [solidSphere_mass m R hr]
  simp only [ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk]
  have h1 : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x ∂volume = 0 := by
    rw [← neg_eq_self_iff]
    calc -∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x ∂volume
        = ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, -x ∂volume := by rw [integral_neg]
      _ = ∫ x in (Neg.neg) '' Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x ∂volume := by
          rw [MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_det_fderiv_smul]
          · simp only [fderiv_neg, ContinuousLinearMap.det_neg_id, abs_neg, abs_one, one_smul]
          · exact MeasurableSet.inter Metric.measurableSet_closedBall measurableSet_univ
          · exact fun _ _ => hasStrictFDerivAt_neg.hasFDerivAt
          · exact Neg.neg.injective
      _ = ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x ∂volume := by
          congr 1
          ext y
          simp only [Set.mem_image, Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right]
          constructor
          · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
            simp [hx]
          · intro hy
            exact ⟨-y, by simp [hy], by simp⟩
  simp [h1]
